body:
## Summary

- Add `--focus-celebration-burst-accessibility` routing to `scripts/validate-content.js`.
- Expand CelebrationBurst accessibility parity from 11 to 13 rules by separately guarding reduced-motion and animated hidden-tree branches.
- Add selector-routing coverage so the CelebrationBurst parity suite cannot fall back to full content validation.

## Validation

- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-celebration-burst-accessibility`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-celebration-burst-accessibility-parity.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js --test-name-pattern "CelebrationBurst|celebration burst|focus-celebration"`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false` with the existing repo `node_modules` temporarily linked into this isolated worktree
- `git diff --check`
title: [codex] Focus CelebrationBurst accessibility validation
